use_cases: Hero section animated headline with electric lightning effects
Splash page or loading screen with dramatic visual impact
Creative portfolio showcase with dynamic text reveals
Gaming or streaming platform aesthetic headers
ai_summary: A canvas-based lightning text animation component that progressively reveals text with electric bolt effects and particle systems. The animation scans text pixel-by-pixel, generating random lightning strikes and glowing particles along the text boundaries. Perfect for hero sections, splash screens, and creative projects requiring dramatic visual impact.
